name: Pagination and Lazy Loading
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure pagination and lazy loading options to control how customers navigate through search results and collections. These settings affect page load performance and browsing experience, with lazy loading providing seamless infinite scroll while traditional pagination offers discrete page navigation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Choosing between pagination styles impacts both technical performance and user experience. Lazy loading creates a continuous browsing experience that can help improve engagement by eliminating pagination clicks, while traditional pagination provides clearer navigation points and may perform better for certain use cases. Selecting the appropriate approach helps optimize the browsing experience for your specific catalog size and customer preferences."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This guide provides detailed instructions on how to implement and configure pagination and lazy loading for our search and collection pages in your Shopify store using the Liquid language."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Default Pagination"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By default, our search and collection pages display results using pagination. You can customize this behavior through the Shopify Theme Editor."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step-by-Step Instructions"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "1. Accessing the Theme Editor"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Log in to your Shopify admin panel."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to\u00a0"}, {"text": "Online Store", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0>\u00a0"}, {"text": "Themes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Click on\u00a0"}, {"text": "Customize", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0to open the Theme Editor."}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "2. Navigating to the Search Grid"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the Theme Editor, navigate to the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Search Results", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0page where our Search Grid is integrated."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Search Grid", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0component to access its settings."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RTO3Z0GBU2AH/7dfaa9e-d0a1d0bdd0b8d0bcd0bed0ba-d18dd0bad180d0b0d0bdd0b0-2024-06-21-d0b2-15-29-06.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/RTO3Z0GBU2AH/7dfaa9e-d0a1d0bdd0b8d0bcd0bed0ba-d18dd0bad180d0b0d0bdd0b0-2024-06-21-d0b2-15-29-06.png", "name": "7dfaa9e-D0A1D0BDD0B8D0BCD0BED0BA_D18DD0BAD180D0B0D0BDD0B0_2024-06-21_D0B2_15.29.06.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 753001, "width": 2782, "height": 1198, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FRTO3Z0GBU2AH%2F7dfaa9e-d0a1d0bdd0b8d0bcd0bed0ba-d18dd0bad180d0b0d0bdd0b0-2024-06-21-d0b2-15-29-06.png", "mediaID": 1149, "dateInserted": "2025-10-22T19:57:37+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "\n3. Configuring Lazy Loading"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Search Grid Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0on the right side of the screen, locate the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Use lazy loading pagination", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0option."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Check the box next to this option to enable lazy loading instead of pagination."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/W3NVX123YRSJ/0b130aa-untitled-7.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/W3NVX123YRSJ/0b130aa-untitled-7.png", "name": "0b130aa-Untitled_7.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 99841, "width": 606, "height": 1110, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FW3NVX123YRSJ%2F0b130aa-untitled-7.png", "mediaID": 1150, "dateInserted": "2025-10-22T19:57:56+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "4. Setting the Autoload Field"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Below the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Use lazy loading pagination", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0option, you will find the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Autoload", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0field."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter the number of times the next pages should load automatically while scrolling before the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Next page", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0button appears."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "For example, if you enter\u00a0"}, {"text": "3", "code": true}, {"text": ", the next three pages of results will load automatically as the user scrolls down, and then a\u00a0"}, {"text": "Next page", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0button will appear."}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Troubleshooting"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you encounter any issues while configuring lazy loading or if the settings do not appear to be applying correctly, try the following steps:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Clear your browser cache and refresh the page."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Ensure that you have saved all changes in the Theme Editor before previewing or publishing them."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Check for any conflicting settings or customizations in your theme that might interfere with our  settings."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
